# Moger Mulluk

> Moger Mulluk is a cozy café located in Dhaka, Bangladesh, offering tea, coffee, and a space for relaxed hangouts.

## Core Navigation
- [Menu](https://moger-mulluk.vercel.app/en/menu) - Explore our beverage and food menu.
- [Locations](https://moger-mulluk.vercel.app/en/locations) - Find our branch addresses and opening hours.
- [Special Offers](https://moger-mulluk.vercel.app/en/offers) - View active deals and promotions.
- [About Us](https://moger-mulluk.vercel.app/en/about) - Read about our history and values.
